summary: Comprehensive testing of new Transaction features: 5 destination types (Treasury, Client Bank, USDT, PSP, Vendor), USDT Treasury accounts, and Approvals page enhancements. All 11 backend tests passed. All UI features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: Withdrawal + Client Bank creates transaction with bank details (no treasury selector required)
Backend: Withdrawal + USDT creates transaction with client USDT address and network
Backend: Deposit to Treasury requires destination_account_id
Backend: Deposit to PSP with commission_paid_by
Backend: Deposit to Vendor
Backend: Create USDT Treasury account with wallet address, network, and notes
Backend: Deposit to USDT Treasury account
Backend: Upload proof for withdrawal transaction
Backend: Upload proof rejected for deposit (withdrawal only)
Backend: Pending transactions include client bank details
Backend: Pending transactions include client USDT details
Frontend: Transaction form has 5 destination types (Treasury/Bank, Client Bank, USDT, PSP, Vendor)
Frontend: Client Bank destination shows Bank Name, Account Name, Account Number, SWIFT/IBAN, Currency fields
Frontend: Client Bank destination does NOT show treasury selector
Frontend: USDT Withdrawal shows client USDT address and network selector (TRC20/ERC20/BEP20)
Frontend: USDT Deposit shows USDT Treasury Account selector
Frontend: Treasury page has USDT Wallet account type in dropdown
Frontend: USDT Treasury form shows Wallet Address, Network, and Private Notes fields
Frontend: Approvals page shows client bank details for bank withdrawals (Bank name, Account number, SWIFT, Currency)
Frontend: Approvals page shows client USDT details for USDT withdrawals (Address, Network badge)
Frontend: Upload Proof button appears on withdrawal transactions
Frontend: Upload Proof dialog shows transaction details including bank/USDT destination info
seed_data_creation: Test transactions created during testing include bank and USDT withdrawals
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Transaction features fully tested. 5 destination types working: Treasury, Client Bank (shows bank details form), USDT (withdrawal shows client address/network, deposit shows USDT treasury selector), PSP, Vendor. USDT Treasury accounts can be created with wallet address, network (TRC20/ERC20/BEP20), and private notes. Approvals page shows bank/USDT details for withdrawals and has Upload Proof button. Upload-proof endpoint at POST /api/transactions/{id}/upload-proof works for withdrawal transactions only.

destination_types.treasury: Working - Deposit/Withdrawal to treasury bank accounts
destination_types.client_bank: Working - Withdrawal shows client bank details form (Bank Name, Account Name, Account Number, SWIFT/IBAN, Currency)
destination_types.usdt: Working - Deposit shows USDT treasury selector, Withdrawal shows client USDT address and network
destination_types.psp: Working - Deposit via PSP with commission

client_bank_for_withdrawals.no_treasury_selector: Working - Treasury selector hidden for bank destination

usdt_features.client_usdt_address: Working - Text input for client's USDT wallet address
usdt_features.client_usdt_network: Working - Dropdown with TRC20, ERC20, BEP20 options

approvals_page.bank_details_shown: Working - Shows bank name, account number, SWIFT, currency for bank withdrawals
approvals_page.usdt_details_shown: Working - Shows truncated USDT address with network badge (ERC20/TRC20/BEP20)
approvals_page.upload_proof_dialog: Working - Shows transaction details and file upload
